changes.comment: fix: externalize @vielzeug/ore/directives, /forms, /observers (mapped to the same Ore global) in the IIFE bundle — previously only the bare @vielzeug/ore specifier was externalized, so Rollup silently inlined a second copy of ore's module graph into refine.iife.js, and any lifecycle hook (getHost, onMounted, etc.) resolved through it always threw 'outside setup'. Fixes broken docs component previews for every component using useField/when/live/raw/styleMap/resizeObserver/intersectionObserver.
